title: greenoke.adapter.json
description: The contract a per-project adapter satisfies. The project-agnostic core resolves every path and behavior through this manifest at each skill's Phase 0. There are no project nouns in the core — only the keys defined here.

greenoke_version.description: Core version constraint this adapter targets (semver range).

project.description: Identity of the project this adapter belongs to.

name.description: Machine name (slug). Used in commit subjects and run-id prefixes.

language.description: Primary implementation language (free-form; e.g. 'python', 'csharp', 'rust', 'typescript'). The core does not branch on this — it is metadata the researcher and writers read.

repo_root.description: Repository root relative to the manifest location. Usually '.'.

inputs.description: Where feature briefs and other pipeline inputs live, and how to interpret them.

spec.description: The spec-phase input source. The spec skill enumerates this directory per 'kind'.

dir.description: Directory holding feature briefs, relative to repo_root.

kind.description: How the skill interprets the input set. Adapter-defined; the core enforces presence, the adapter defines the shape.

required.description: If true, the spec skill hard-fails when the directory is empty. Default true.

capability_provider.description: How agents drive the project's live system. Implements the verb contract in contracts/capability-provider.md.

kind.description: Transport by which agents reach the provider.

launch.description: Command (argv form) that starts/serves the provider, when applicable. Omitted for kind 'none'.

capabilities.description: Which contract verbs this provider implements. 'health' is required for stale_system_guard to function.

templates.description: Adapter template fragments injected into the core spec/plan templates at the documented INJECT points.

spec_fragments.description: Path to domain spec sections injected into feature-spec.core.md.

plan_fragments.description: Path to domain plan sections injected into feature-plan.core.md.

rules.description: Project convention rules, auto-loaded by glob.

dir.description: Directory of rule markdown files, relative to repo_root.

auto_load.description: Whether rules are auto-loaded. Default true.

knowledge_base.description: The durable, committed institutional-memory root (the .greenoke/ schema).

dir.description: Knowledge-base root, relative to repo_root. Conventionally '.greenoke'.

run_dir.description: Ephemeral, gitignored per-run scaffolding root. Conventionally '.greenoke-run'. Runs write under <run_dir>/<run-id>/{spec,plan,build}/.

banned_tokens_source.description: Optional path to an adapter-supplied banned-token list (project nouns) appended to the core cross-section impl-leakage list. Absent → core list only.

verification.description: Commands and validators the build/probe phases run to prove the work.

build_smoke.description: Command the probe runs as the structural smoke check (compile/test/lint). Adapter-defined; the core runs it verbatim.

artifact_validator.description: Optional path to a project script that validates a produced artifact (the proof-of-life the provider's verify() drives).
